formatting_rules.followup_signature: Do not add sender name, initials, website, or full signature in follow-up copy.

scheduling_rules.thursday_or_friday_logic: If prospect replies Thursday or Friday, propose Monday or Tuesday next week.
scheduling_rules.proposal_style: Offer 2 options across 2 working days whenever possible.

positive_share_more_info.intent: Prospect says yes, interested, send more info, share more, sounds good, or similar.
positive_share_more_info.template:
Hey {{firstName}},

The idea is to help {{companyName}} build a cleaner revenue pipeline where inbound leads, outbound prospects, and open deals are followed up without relying on manual work.

We do this by combining lead capture, enrichment, AI-personalized outbound, retargeting, and post-meeting follow-up into one managed system. The goal is not to add another tool for your team to manage, but to make sure fewer qualified opportunities slip through the cracks.

I’d be glad to walk you through {{call_agenda_3_to_4_items}}.

Does {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}} work for you? Please let me know and I will send the invite.

Best,
{{sendingAccountName}}
{{website}}

positive_with_context.intent: Prospect says yes and adds context, humor, concern, or business detail.

meeting_ready.intent: Prospect says let's meet, send times, book a call, calendar, happy to chat, or similar.
meeting_ready.template:
Hey {{firstName}},

I’d be glad to walk you through how Ascendly captures inbound leads, launches AI-personalized outbound, keeps prospects warm through retargeting, and follows up after meetings so deals do not go quiet.

I am available {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}}. Let me know what works, and I will send the invitation.

Kind regards,
{{sendingAccountName}}

pricing_question.intent: Prospect asks about pricing, cost, quote, package, budget, or rate.
pricing_question.template:
Hey {{firstName}},

Pricing is a fair starting point, but let’s first figure out if, assuming there’s no pricing constraint, Ascendly would actually fit {{companyName}} and support the kind of pipeline consistency you’re aiming for.

Typically, we walk through how inbound leads are handled, where outbound could be improved, and whether retargeting plus AI follow-up would help create more qualified conversations.

Either way, you’ll leave with a clearer view of where revenue opportunities may be slipping.

Does {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}} work?

And no worries, you will not have to pay a single dollar just to get into the call.

Kind regards,
{{sendingAccountName}}

followup_1.template:
Hi {{firstName}}, {{contextual_check_question}}

I shared some availability last time, but didn’t see a confirmation come through. Let’s get something on the calendar so we don’t lose momentum.

We can do {{previous_proposed_time_1}} or {{previous_proposed_time_2}}. Do either of those work for you? If not, I’m happy to adjust around your schedule.

Best,

followup_2.template:
{{firstName}}?

I am still interested in learning if {{companyName}} is currently focused on improving pipeline consistency and getting more qualified sales conversations from the leads and prospects already in motion.

Ascendly helps by connecting inbound capture, AI-personalized outbound, retargeting, and post-meeting follow-up into one managed revenue system.

I’d be glad to share how this could work for {{companyName}}.

Does {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}} work best for a quick call?

Best,

followup_3.template:
Hi {{firstName}},

We build and operate revenue systems that let {{companyName}} capture inbound leads faster, launch AI-personalized outbound, retarget engaged prospects, and keep open deals from going quiet.

I’d love to share more and see if we can lock in a time to chat. It would be great to hop on a quick Zoom call where I can walk you through the pipeline system, the retargeting layer, and the post-meeting follow-up workflow.

I’m available {{proposed_time_1}} or {{proposed_time_2}}. If either works, I’ll send over a calendar invite.

Kind regards,

followup_4.template:
Hi {{firstName}}, we’ve heard from other B2B service leaders that leads rarely disappear because the offer is bad. They disappear because follow-up is inconsistent.

Sound familiar?

Imagine reducing missed inbound leads, cold outbound gaps, and quiet open deals without adding more manual work to your team. Ascendly does that by running the pipeline system behind the scenes.

Would that fit what you are doing now? Let’s meet next week and decide what works best for {{companyName}}.

followup_5.template:
Hey {{firstName}}, I am pitching the same thing here:

Ascendly helps B2B service firms turn inbound leads, outbound prospects, and open deals into a managed pipeline system instead of scattered manual follow-up.

Not only that, we also add AI-personalized outreach, retargeting between email touchpoints, and post-meeting deal follow-up so fewer opportunities go cold.

Should I just share my calendar link now?

Best,

followup_6.template:
{{firstName}}?

I’ve reached out a few times but haven’t heard back, so I’m assuming Ascendly is not of interest to you for improving pipeline consistency right now, is that right?

Either way, let me know. Certainly don’t want to be a pest.

Thanks in advance,

unsubscribe.action: Do not send. Save log only.

negative_not_interested.action: Do not send unless a polite acknowledgement is clearly required.

call_agenda_examples: how {{companyName}} currently captures and follows up with inbound leads
where AI-personalized outbound could create more qualified conversations
how retargeting can keep prospects familiar between email touchpoints
how post-meeting AI follow-up can keep open deals from going quiet
goal_examples: keep outbound prospects warm between touchpoints
prevent open deals from going cold
create a more consistent high-ticket revenue pipeline
friction_removal_examples: to add another tool for your team to manage
